name: zsys_measure_mhz_via_bsf_loop_qpc
description: CpuBenchmarkResolver::MeasureMhzViaBsfLoop_Qpc measures a fallback CPU rate using a QPC-timed busy loop.
known_limits: The smoke covers this helper through zSys::GetCpuMhz and verifies a nonnegative caller-visible CPU MHz result.
The source uses portable C++ loop spelling; binary-safe verification remains separate compiler-shape work.
